query:

UNION ALL
SELECT 'historicalSales', COUNT(*) FROM historicalSales WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'commissions', COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'properties', COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001'
